public_reputation: Recognized as a overseer of the iron accord of regional weight.
appearance: Work-worn layers, repair marks, and tools or soot traces show responsibility for systems that fail loudly when neglected.
manner: Views problems as maintenance loads, throughput failures, or structural weaknesses before anything else. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a overseer of the iron accord still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of overseer of the iron accord in and around the surrounding locality, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep the surrounding locality workable through the obligations of overseer of the iron accord while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Roaz.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around the surrounding locality, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of overseer of the iron accord visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Working with Commander Halian Roaz can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around the surrounding locality.
Commander Halian Roaz can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Commander Halian Roaz needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in the surrounding locality.
Commander Halian Roaz needs help with a problem in the surrounding locality that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Manner expanded from direct canon support in The Principality of Roaz. Hidden pressure remains conservative operational inference tied to Iron Accord burdens. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Commander Halian Roaz visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: the surrounding locality: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
